title: TEST-01 simulation-harness evidence
description: Evidence artifact emitted by a single run of the TEST-01 deterministic simulation harness (issue #460). Wave-1 ships the headless file-source replayer (L1); provider mock / PTY / VMIC paths (L2-L4) are filled in by successor issue TEST-01b.

schema_version.description: Schema version string. Increment when a field becomes required, is removed, or changes type. Additive optional fields do not require a bump.

harness_id.description: Stable identifier for the harness that produced the artifact.

level.description: Harness ladder level. L1 = file-source replayer (this wave). L2 = provider mock. L3 = PTY harness. L4 = virtual-mic / VMIC roundtrip. L2-L4 are scaffolded by successor TEST-01b.

run_id.description: UUID v4 (or other globally-unique opaque token) identifying this run.

started_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp marking the start of the run.

finished_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp marking the end of the run. Optional: omitted when the run is still in progress.

git_sha.description: Commit SHA the binary under test was built from. Optional in L1 scaffold; required for promotion to release evidence.

platform.description: OS / arch the harness ran on. Optional in the wave-1 scaffold.

fixture.description: Audio fixture used to drive the replayer.

path.description: Repository-relative path to the WAV fixture.

sample_rate_hz.description: Sample rate in Hz. Must be 16000 to match Google STT requirements.

total_samples.description: Total decoded PCM samples in the fixture.

sha256.description: Optional hex-encoded SHA-256 of the WAV bytes, for fixture-drift detection.

chunks_emitted.description: Number of AudioChunks the replayer emitted during the run.

samples_emitted.description: Number of PCM samples the replayer emitted during the run (sum across all chunks).

loops_completed.description: Number of complete loops through the fixture during the run.

wall_clock_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the run in milliseconds. Optional in L1 scaffold.

failures.description: Optional list of human-readable failure descriptions when status != "pass".

metrics.description: Optional level-specific telemetry (RMS, drop count, latency p50/p95/p99, etc.). Open-shape in this scaffold; tightened by successor TEST-01b once L2-L4 land.

notes.description: Free-form notes captured by the harness operator.
